title: CEO Plugin Settings
description: User preferences for the CEO orchestrator. Generated by /ceo:setup or edited manually.

model_tier.description:
Controls which model runs each agent type.

- max_quality: ALL agents run on Opus. Best results, slower, higher cost.
- balanced: Architects/reviewers/strategists on Opus, implementers/developers on Sonnet. Good tradeoff. (DEFAULT)
- max_speed: ALL agents run on Sonnet. Fastest, cheapest, may miss nuance in complex reasoning tasks.

verify_fix.description: Controls the verify-fix loop that reviews every implementation task.

enabled.description: Whether to run a read-only reviewer after each implementation task. Strongly recommended.

max_retries.description: How many verify-fix cycles before escalating to the user.

reviewer_model.description: Which model runs the reviewer. Opus catches more issues; Sonnet is faster.

team_mode.description:
When to use TeamCreate/SendMessage for agent coordination.

- auto: Use teams for coupled workstreams, standalone for independent tasks. (DEFAULT)
- always: Force all multi-agent workstreams into team mode.
- never: Always use standalone Agent() dispatch with handoff documents.

checkpoint.description:
How often the CEO pauses for user approval.

- task: Pause after every single task completes. Maximum control, slowest.
- workstream: Pause after each workstream completes. Good balance. (DEFAULT)
- phase: Pause only at NEXUS phase boundaries. Most autonomous.

preflight_agents.description: Number of agents to consult during the pre-flight phase. More agents = more ambiguities caught, but takes longer.

project_dir.description: Where to create project directories (briefs, plans, outputs, handoffs, context files).

shared_context.description: Whether to create shared context files for workstreams. Prevents duplicate discovery across parallel agents.
